title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kharagpur - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kharagpur - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!
